8. 消除笔工具 下的 具体子元素 都放在class="parameter"容器中 可能子元素内容不一样 这里是消除笔元素
<div class="parameter"><div class="shape_btns"><span data-v-eaf05162="" class="iconfont default-icon icon-shape_5 btn selected" style="font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer; transform: rotate(0deg);"></span><span data-v-eaf05162="" class="iconfont default-icon icon-shape_1 btn" style="font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer; transform: rotate(0deg);"></span></div><div class="slider_box"><div class="head flex between f_14"><span class="text_name">消除笔大小</span><span class="text_val">50</span></div><div class="el-slider el-slider--small slider"><div class="el-slider__runway"><div class="el-slider__bar" style="width: 31.0345%; left: 0%;"></div><div class="el-slider__button-wrapper" tabindex="0" role="slider" aria-label="slider between 5 and 150" aria-valuemin="5" aria-valuemax="150" aria-valuenow="50" aria-valuetext="50" aria-orientation="horizontal" aria-disabled="false" id="el-id-2757-35" style="left: 31.0345%;"><div class="el-slider__button el-tooltip__trigger el-tooltip__trigger"></div></div><!--v-if--><!--v-if--><!--v-if--></div><!--v-if--></div></div><div class="footer_btns w_full"><button aria-disabled="false" type="button" class="el-button is-round w_full"><!--v-if--><span class="">恢复原图</span></button></div></div>
消除笔元素（默认）
<span data-v-eaf05162="" class="iconfont default-icon icon-shape_5 btn" style="font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer; transform: rotate(0deg);"></span>
框选消除元素
<span data-v-eaf05162="" class="iconfont default-icon icon-shape_1 btn" style="font-size: 24px; cursor: pointer; transform: rotate(0deg);"></span>

这是点击裁剪后 打开 裁剪模块的 完整元素

<div data-v-86c65ee5="" class="module crop_module"><div data-v-86c65ee5="" class="open selected pos_r flex align_center"><span data-v-eaf05162="" data-v-86c65ee5="" class="iconfont default-icon
